title: The Kazis Act, 1880
full_text: The Kazis Act, 1880 काज़ी अधिनियम,1880 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 188012 Act Number: 12 Enactment Date: 1880-07-09 Act Year: 1880 Short Title: The Kazis Act, 1880 Hindi Title: काज़ी अधिनियम,1880 Long Title: An Act for the appointment of persons to the Office of Kazi. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 09-07-1880 Last Updated: 25-02-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Kazis Act, 1880 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Power to appoint Kazis for any local area. Section 3. Naib Kazis. Section 4. Nothing in Act to confer judicial or administrative powers; or to render the presence of Kazi necessary; or to prevent any one acting as Kazi.
